docket_entries.description: DECLARATORY RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF S. KITTRIDGE COLLINS (CO-TRUSTEE OF THE COLLINS FAMILY TRUST, DATED MAY 26, 1989) AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, WILLIAM R. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE, OBTAIN ANSWER(S), ENTER DEFAULT(S), OR DISMISS DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
